metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics / Sentinel workspace

properties.displayName: Entra ID - MFA fatigue attack detected (push bombing)
properties.description: Detects accounts that accumulate more than 5 MFA denial events (ResultType 500121 / 50074 / 50076) within a 10-minute rolling window — the signature of a push-bombing / MFA-fatigue attack. The rule boosts risk priority for accounts on the VIPUsers or PrivilegedAccounts watchlists. ATT&CK: T1110 - Brute Force (Credential Access); upgrade target T1621 deferred to v0.2.0. TUNE: DenialThreshold (default 5), TimeWindowMinutes (default 10), LookbackWindow (default 1d). Review TUNE comments in the query before deployment.
